Snowball's weight increases by current height\n//  2. If stone 1 is at this height, snowball loses u1 weight (clamped to 0)\n//  3. If stone 2 is at this height, snowball loses u2 weight (clamped to 0)\nghost function WeightAfterHeight(weight: int, height: int,\n                           u1: int, d1: int, u2: int, d2: int): int\n{\n  var afterGain  := weight + height;\n  var afterStone1 := if height == d1 then Max0(afterGain - u1) else afterGain;\n  var afterStone2 := if height == d2 then Max0(afterStone1 - u2) else afterStone1;\n  afterStone2\n}\n\n// The descending sequence of heights the snowball visits: [h, h-1, ..., 1, 0]\nghost function Heights(h: int): seq<int>\n  decreases if h >= 0 then h + 1 else 0\n{\n  if h < 0 then []\n  else [h] + Heights(h - 1)\n}\n\n// The snowball's weight after rolling through the given sequence of heights\nghost function RollThrough(w: int, heights: seq<int>,\n                     u1: int, d1: int, u2: int, d2: int): int\n  decreases |heights|\n{\n  if |heights| == 0 then w\n  else RollThrough(WeightAfterHeight(w, heights[0], u1, d1, u2, d2),\n                   heights[1..], u1, d1, u2, d2)\n}\n\nmethod Snowball(w: int, h: int, u1: int, d1: int, u2: int, d2: int) returns (finalWeight: int)\n  ensures finalWeight == RollThrough(w, Heights(h), u1, d1, u2, d2)\n{\n  finalWeight := w;\n  var i := h;\n  while i >= 0\n    invariant i >= -1\n    invariant RollThrough(w, Heights(h), u1, d1, u2, d2) == RollThrough(finalWeight, Heights(i), u1, d1, u2, d2)\n    decreases i + 1\n  {\n    var oldWeight := finalWeight;\n    finalWeight := finalWeight + i;\n    if i == d1 {\n      finalWeight := finalWeight - u1;\n      if finalWeight < 0 {\n        finalWeight := 0;\n      }\n    }\n    if i == d2 {\n      finalWeight := finalWeight - u2;\n      if finalWeight < 0 {\n        finalWeight := 0;\n      }\n    }\n    assert finalWeight == WeightAfterHeight(oldWeight, i, u1, d1, u2, d2);\n    assert Heights(i) == [i] + Heights(i - 1);\n    i := i - 1;\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":10090,"cache_read_input_tokens":8610,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":10090},"output_tokens":10,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c7768ae5-48be-4e8d-a82f-b7179dc4057d","uuid":"71388ed0-e380-46d3-8b01-53a4aef9a8fb"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017Y1daS8JkkPpZLngq6YCQG","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /Users/mchiesa/work/projects/2026-02-dafny-liftings/smt_analysis/results/0033_1099_A/verified.dfy"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c7768ae5-48be-4e8d-a82f-b7179dc4057d","uuid":"db6f0b1b-1d52-4609-a7f6-1d5aff0604fd","timestamp":"2026-03-17T19:15:35.547Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/Users/mchiesa/work/projects/2026-02-dafny-liftings/smt_analysis/results/0033_1099_A/verified.dfy","content":"// Clamp negative weights to zero, per the problem rules\nghost function Max0(x: int): int {\n  if x < 0 then 0 else x\n}\n\n// \"Each second the following sequence of events happens\" at a given height:\n//  1.
